action.reasoning: Observation: the four-checkpoint ViT ensemble reduced hidden accuracy to 0.9389 versus the previous best 0.9399 from the three-checkpoint ensemble checkpoints_vit_j8/best.pt + checkpoints_vit_seed42/best.pt + checkpoints_vit/last.pt. Analysis: with only one iteration remaining, the safest action is to restore the known best inference configuration and resubmit it so the final workspace matches the best-scoring submission. Decision: update predict.py back to the three-ViT ensemble and submit checkpoints_vit_j8/best.pt.
